title: Example FIB-SEM datasets for segmentation, spatial analysis, and visualization of volume electron microscopy datasets
author: Andreas Müller
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This record contains demo FIB-SEM raw data and segmentation masks for the protocol paper: 

 Müller et al.  A modular protocol for segmentation, spatial analysis, and visualization of volume electron microscopy datasets  

 It contains 

 - `high_c1_source.tif` raw FIB-SEM stack (16nm^3 resolution) of a mouse pancreatic cell 
- `data_golgi` volumetric training data for golgi segmentation 
- `data_granules` volumetric training data for secretory granule segmentation 
- `high_c1` input folder with segmentation masks for cellsketch 
- `mycell.n5` input folder for spatial analysis and visualization
